vibe: Authority, clarity, functional beauty, command-center precision. Objective, rigid, and functional.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Generous internal padding for reading (p-6, p-8). Tight functional spacing for data tables (p-2, p-3).
layout_and_spacing.dashboard_grid: Grid layout using grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4. Gap-6. Strictly cardless or 1px flat borders. 0px border radius.
layout_and_spacing.split_panel: For the AI Parser: A split 50/50 screen (grid grid-cols-2). Left panel: raw text input with bg-zinc-50. Right panel: structured data forms with bg-white. Separated by a single stark border-r border-zinc-200.

buttons.primary: bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-700 text-white font-medium rounded-none px-6 py-2.5 transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-white border border-zinc-300 hover:bg-zinc-50 text-zinc-950 rounded-none px-6 py-2.5 transition-colors
buttons.danger: bg-red-500 hover:bg-red-600 text-white font-medium rounded-none px-6 py-2.5 transition-colors

cards.style: bg-white border border-zinc-200 rounded-none shadow-none p-6

inputs.style: bg-transparent border border-zinc-300 rounded-none p-3 text-sm focus:border-blue-600 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-blue-600 transition-all focus:outline-none w-full

badges.style: rounded-none px-2.5 py-1 text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider

tables.header: border-y border-zinc-300 bg-zinc-50 py-3 px-4 font-bold text-zinc-600 uppercase tracking-wider text-xs

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Crisp color shifts. No scaling or bouncing animations. Use explicit hover text colors.
motion_and_interactions.focus: Focus states must have a sharp 2px ring in Signal Blue (ring-blue-600) with no ring-offset.

images.description: Aerial view of a cargo ship on the ocean. To be used on the login screen, split 50/50 with the login form. The image should NOT have a heavy overlay if it occupies its own panel.
Abstract pattern of wavy grey lines on white background. Use this inside the AI parser loading state or empty state to suggest processing data.

accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive elements (buttons, links, form inputs, tabs) MUST include a kebab-case data-testid attribute based on their role.
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Adhere strictly to 4.5:1 ratio. Text colors over diff backgrounds must be dark enough (e.g. text-green-900 over bg-green-100).

instructions_to_main_agent: Install Google Fonts: 'Chivo' (Headings), 'IBM Plex Sans' (Body), and 'JetBrains Mono' (Data/Diffs). Add them to tailwind.config.js.
Use Lucide-React for all icons. Do not install other icon sets.
The UI is 'Cardless & Flat'. Do not use shadow-md or soft radiuses. Everything is border-zinc-200 and rounded-none.

For the 'AI Recap Parser', create a rigid two-column layout. The left column is the raw broker email text (using textarea with font-mono). The right is the structured output form. The user pastes text, clicks 'Parse', and the right side populates.
For the 'Recap Detail Page', use strict tabs to toggle between Overview, Raw Text, Versions (Diff Viewer), and Approvals.
Version Diff Viewer must explicitly colorize added words in green and removed words in red, maintaining a monospaced layout to simulate a code diff.
Always include explicit 'data-testid' on UI elements for testing.
